title: Iran rejects MoU, counteroffer via Oman
snippet: Iran formally rejected Trump's MoU June 6. Baghaei: "unacceptable, not aligned with ongoing negotiations." Filed counteroffer through Omani intermediaries. Inverts sequencing: frozen assets first ($12-24B), nuclear separate. Proposes diluting HEU + transferring to third country with return clause.
tag_reason: MoU 거부 + 오만 경유 역제안은 6/9 MBC 보도(src-1670)의 후속으로 구체적 내용 포함
